Metadata.title: GmSportStudio | Video Analysis Software for Basketball
Metadata.description: Break down basketball games with pro-grade telestration, advanced scouting and lightning-fast clip cutting. Native YouTube integration. Monthly plans, yearly plans and club licenses. Elite-level technology at a price that fits your program.
Metadata.ogTitle: GmSportStudio | Sports Video Analysis for Coaches
Metadata.ogDescription: Telestration, scouting and clips in seconds. Native YouTube integration. Pro-grade analysis built for coaches — at a price that actually works.
Metadata.ogImageAlt: GmSportStudio — Sports video analysis software for basketball and soccer
Metadata.twitterDescription: Telestration, scouting and clip cutting. Pro-grade tools for coaches — at a price that actually works.

HeroSection.subtitle: GmSportStudio puts pro-grade analysis on your laptop. Telestration, scouting and clip cutting in seconds — at a price any coach can afford.

CountdownHero.ariaLabel: {days} days, {hours} hours, {minutes} minutes and {seconds} seconds until the Beta opens

WhySection.subtitle: The same level of analysis professional teams use, with plans designed for individual coaches and clubs at every level.

youtube.title: Break down any game in seconds
youtube.body: Forget downloading video files or paying for streaming platforms. Paste a YouTube URL and start telestrating, tagging events and cutting clips right away. No conversions, no waiting.

dashboard.title: All your data at a glance
dashboard.body: A single panel that brings together players, sessions, clips and stats. Filter by game, player or tactical action. Present your reports straight from the app — no exports required.

price.title: Elite tech for modest clubs
price.body: Pro-grade analysis software has historically been out of reach for most clubs. GmSportStudio breaks that barrier with monthly plans, yearly plans and team license packs — without cutting a single feature.

FeaturesSection.subtitle: Professional analysis tools designed for coaches who value their time.

multipartido.title: Multiple games, one project
multipartido.description: Group every game of a matchday, opponent or season into a single project. Switch between games without losing your analysis context.

youtube.title: Native YouTube
youtube.description: Paste any game URL and start breaking it down instantly.

clips.title: Ultra-fast Clip Cutting
clips.description: Mark in and out with a single key. Export the play in seconds.

db.title: Local Database
db.description: Your reports, sessions and players stored offline. Always with you — no cloud required.

PricingSection.subtitle: Special launch price only for those who come in with the Founder Pass. Limited spots.
PricingSection.planSubtitle: Claim your spot now and become one of the first to use the tool.

benefits.access: Full access from April 30 through the official launch
benefits.support: Priority support directly with the team
benefits.discount: Permanent discount on the future subscription

PricingSection.clubTitle: 5 seats · the full coaching staff analyzing in parallel
PricingSection.clubBody: All 5 coaches work on the same clip library, tactical playbook and shared scouting. Available after the official launch.
PricingSection.futureFounderNote: Coming soon · Founders keep a permanent discount
PricingSection.b2bText: Federation, academy or club with more than 5 coaches?

faqs.q0: When can I access the Beta?
faqs.a0: The Beta opens on April 30, 2026. If you complete the sign-up form now, you lock in your spot (they're limited) and you'll receive the download link by email that same day.
faqs.q1: Do I need an external video subscription?
faqs.a1: No. GmSportStudio integrates natively with YouTube, so you can analyze any public game without any extra subscription. For your own footage, you can import local files.
faqs.q2: Does it work on Mac and PC?
faqs.a2: Yes. The app runs on macOS (Apple Silicon and Intel) and Windows 10/11. The installer adapts automatically to your platform.
faqs.q3: What pricing plans will there be after launch?
faqs.a3: Three options. For individual coaches: a Monthly plan at €15/month or a Yearly plan at €99/year (you save 45% vs. monthly). For clubs and academies: the Club plan with 5 seats at €299/year (or €40/month), built so the whole coaching staff works on the same clip library and scouting. Anyone who joins with the €9.99 Founder Pass keeps a permanent discount on any of these plans. Federations and clubs with more than 5 coaches: reach out to clubes@gmsportstudio.com for a custom offer.

Footer.tagline: Sports video analysis software for coaches who want to win.

CookieBanner.text: We use technical storage (Firebase) and cookieless analytics (Vercel).
